DEFENDANT MARRIOT INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF, IN GOOD FAITH, CAN ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO A DUTY ON DFENDANT'S PART TO PROTECT PLAINTIFF FROM THE HARM THAT OCCURRED.
